brand.name: WattsGood
intake.title: Find Your Energy Assistance Programs
intake.subtitle: Answer a few questions to discover every NYC energy assistance program your household qualifies for.
intake.senior60Plus: Has a member age 60 or older
intake.annualIncome.helper: Include all sources before taxes (wages, benefits, Social Security, etc.)
intake.existingBenefits: Are you currently enrolled in any of these programs?
intake.existingBenefits.helper: Select all that apply. Existing benefits can qualify you for additional programs automatically.
intake.language.helper: Program descriptions from the assistant will use this language when possible. Form labels stay in your app language (English or Español) above.
intake.step0.title: Who's in your household?
intake.step0.subtitle: Count everyone who lives with you, including yourself.
intake.step0.membersLabel: Does your household include any of the following?
intake.step0.child.sublabel: Children under 6 may unlock additional benefits
intake.step0.senior.sublabel: Seniors 60+ qualify for priority HEAP access
intake.step0.disabled.sublabel: Disability status may expand your eligibility
intake.step1.title: Annual household income
intake.step1.subtitle: Include all sources before taxes — wages, Social Security, benefits, etc.
intake.step1.helper: Most NYC energy programs serve households earning up to 80% of Area Median Income (~$77k for a family of 4).
intake.step1.tier1.label: Under $20k
intake.step1.tier2.label: $20k–$50k
intake.step1.tier3.label: $50k–$80k
intake.step2.title: Where do you live?
intake.step2.subtitle: Some programs are borough-specific or have local application offices.
intake.step3.title: Your energy setup
intake.step3.subtitle: This helps us find utility-specific discounts and rebates.
intake.step3.billHelper: Your best estimate — doesn't need to be exact.
intake.step4.title: Current benefits & preferences
intake.step4.subtitle: Existing benefits can automatically qualify you for additional programs — no extra applications needed.
intake.step4.langHelper: Program details from the AI assistant will use this language.
intake.footer: Your information is used only to check eligibility. We don't store or share your data.
intake.validation.income: Please enter your annual household income.
intake.housing.renter_pay_utilities: Renter — I pay my own utilities
results.title: Your Energy Assistance Results
results.disclaimer: This is not legal or financial advice. Eligibility assessments are estimates based on publicly available program guidelines. Confirm eligibility directly with each program before applying.
loading.title: Checking {count} programs across {agencies} agencies...
loading.msg2: Evaluating Con Edison & National Grid discounts...
cascade.bannerSubtitle_one: Applying to one program automatically qualifies you for {count} additional benefit path — no extra income verification required.
cascade.bannerSubtitle_other: Applying to one program automatically qualifies you for {count} additional benefit paths — no extra income verification required.
cascade.verifyNote: Verify with a caseworker — rule confirmed but subject to program availability.
cascade.checkNote: Confirm eligibility with the program before applying.
cascade.resultsSub: across your programs and cascade unlocks
